name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Bernie is counting on you before Sunday’s deadline:
body:
Bernie can’t do this alone.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=823%2E150750%2E-dA43q)

This Sunday marks the first official FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign, and we're trying to report as many individual donations as possible.

**Read Bernie’s note below and add your donation today to send a powerful message about the strength of our movement ahead of this critical deadline.**

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190325-2-120&t=2&akid=823%2E150750%2E-dA43q)

* * *

Sisters and Brothers -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign before our first official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth: when this deadline ends, we are going to report how much money we’ve raised and, just as important, how many individual donations make up that number.
So our job is to report as many donations as we possibly can. And we’re looking for a huge number here. Because every single donation sends a powerful message that our progressive campaign is the best one to beat Trump.
So with time running out, here’s the part where I ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign before our first, official fundraising deadline comes to an end? We’re looking to report as many individual donations as we possibly can. We would not ask if it was not important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10226?refcode=em190325-2-120&t=27&akid=823%2E150750%2E-dA43q)
This struggle is about taking on the incredibly powerful institutions that control the economic and political life of this country. And what we will prove with our report is that we are the best campaign to defeat them, and to transform this country.
Every donation sends that message. So thank you in advance for adding yours today.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Week in the district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
I just arrived back to Capitol Hill after a wonderful week at home in the district!
| | Good morning!

I just arrived back to Capitol Hill after a wonderful week at home in the district!

Just like last month's "district week", my week at home affirmed why I ran -- I ran to listen to the people of Virginia's 7th district and be an accountable, accessible representative.

I toured businesses, both large and small in Culpeper and spoke with innovative entrepreneurs about their concerns.

I met with students and teachers at the intermediate, middle and high schools in Nottoway County and I hosted a county-wide Town Hall.

I organized a Coffee with Your Congressperson informal event in Culpeper, and had a large open conversation with voters about the issues that matter to them.

I held a roundtable with local farmers in Amelia to hear from our agricultural leaders, and left energized with ideas of what we can do legislatively.

I visited a military installation in Chesterfield and learned about their mission and tremendous work from the military and civilian leaders posted there.

I met with constituents and advocates at our offices in Henrico, and checked in with our team to get an update on all of our work helping constituents in the District.

From St. Patrick's Day festivities to a county-wide school art show to an evening with the American Legion, I joined fellow Central Virginians in celebration, but I also joined my neighbors in mourning as we gathered to mourn those killed in New Zealand and affirm our support for our local Muslim community.

At each event, whether formal or informal, celebratory or solemn, I heard from people who want the best for our community, commonwealth, and country. I heard directly from people who want to engage with those elected to serve them, whether they voted for them or not. I am privileged to serve them, and grateful for the time they spent with me.

As I get back to work in Washington on the legislative side, I will carry their voices, energy, and ideas with me!

Thank you for your continued support!

_-Abigail_

Peter,

As we near our first fundraising deadline of this election, I have been thinking a lot about the work we did last year. I love what our team did to give the Texas 10th the closest election it had ever seen, and I love the volunteers, donors, and supporters who made it possible. One reason I am running for Congress is that our "Rep." McCaul has left the district behind. He hasn't held townhalls, he hasn't fought for people affected by disasters like Hurricane Harvey, and he hasn't fought for the students, workers and seniors who live in these nine counties. My commitment is to show up and be there for the people of TX-10. To show up for people like these, who joined and inspired us in 2018.

**And for the 2020 campaign, we kicked off in January — with an amazing turnout over a year before the primary. Our work has inspired the type of engagement we need to flip this district. I know this turnout inspired me!** ******During the last government shutdown, our volunteers took action to support a food drive for federal workers that, in concert with the Texas AFL-CIO, gathered thousands of pounds of donations for the Central Texas Food Bank. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5637329/49488435/1963719225?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTkxOGUzZS1kZTRmLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4Nzg0ZjFiMmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ERZMeTLFuyfnc1SJYcjd44jbn8g7O32pk8H7KPl8Ckg=) **And in February we drove to El Paso to stand up for our immigrant communities and against this administration's immigration policies. ** I want to thank everyone who has knocked a door, given a dollar, or told a friend about our campaign. We can win this race if we work together and can restore adequate representation to this district. Thank you for everything you have done to support our campaign!

In solidarity,
Mike Siegel

name: Jason Yates
subject: Seize the Opportunity
body:
| | We can make a lasting difference right where we are
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XOBuaI4vqMGV7Z78Jx19HcLJbPWUE7lhcwSIYtLblhs916anBSH4FwvnykQNeitNr8H0tmfjwQkF8GVqh9TYLZB&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190326com01&n=1)
| Peter, Opportunities are always before us. Sometimes they are unexpected and other times they are anticipated. But they are all God-given gifts for us to learn to be sensitive to the leading of the Holy Spirit and move forward with our response. At My Faith Votes, we encourage you to do three simple things: PRAY, THINK, and ACT. It’s a formula for everyday life, not just for voting. As an opportunity arises, we seek the Lord in prayer, we consult with scripture to follow God’s principles, and then we take action on the opportunity before us, allowing the influence of our faith to be a source for good to those around us. Too many Christians fail to see voting in this same light. We look at the dysfunction and corruption in government and easily become discouraged that our vote has no impact and does no good. Your vote _does_ matter. Let me tell you why. name: Kamala Harris
subject: It’s time for the wealthiest nation in the history of the world to live up to our values
body:
Let’s speak some truth. For too long, our country has pretended to care
about public education, but has failed to invest in one of the most
important factors in a student’s success: our teachers.

Here is my promise: by the end of my first term as president, we will
close the teacher pay gap in America. We will make the largest federal
investment in teacher pay in American history, giving the average teacher
a $13,500 raise. It’s time to pay teachers what they’re worth.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/190326-teacher-pay?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190326-b&source=ema190326-b&t=1001&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]I need you to join me in this fight. Will you add your name next to
mine to support our plan to give America’s teachers a raise?

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/190326-teacher-pay?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190326-b&source=ema190326-b&t=1002&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]ADD YOUR NAME

Public school teachers in America earn 11% less than similar
professionals, and many teachers work second and third jobs just to make
ends meet. This is a national failure that is holding our country back --
and it’s time for a bold response.

We’re going to close the pay gap. Here’s how.

* Provide a base level of funding to every state in the country, and
incentivize states to do their part to take full advantage of the
plan. The first 10% of funding will come directly from the federal
government. Then, for every $1 a state contributes toward raising
teacher pay, the federal government will invest $3 until the teacher
pay gap is closed.
* America’s highest-need schools, which disproportionately serve
students of color, will receive an additional targeted investment to
increase teacher pay even further. Our plan will help these schools
reduce teacher turnover, attract talented educators, and improve
learning conditions for our kids.
* We’ll support programs dedicated to teacher recruitment, training, and
professional development, particularly at Historically Black Colleges
and Universities. Our plan will include a multi-billion-dollar
investment in programs that help elevate the teaching profession and
support principals and other school leaders.
* We’ll support the right of public educators to join and engage with
their union, and bring the fight for student needs and better pay to
cities and state capitals across America.

We will fund our investment in America’s future by strengthening the
estate tax and closing loopholes that let our country’s wealthiest people
avoid paying their fair share.

It’s time for the wealthiest nation in the history of the world to live up
to its values. That means investing in our public education system and
guaranteeing the opportunity for every child to succeed.

No matter what zip code you live in, you should be able to get a
world-class education in an American public school. Starting today, we
will live up to those values.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/190326-teacher-pay?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190326-b&source=ema190326-b&t=1003&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]If you believe in a future where teachers are given the respect and
resources they deserve, and every child in our country has the opportunity
to succeed, I need you to join me in this fight. Add your name next to
mine to call for the largest federal investment in teacher pay in American
history.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/190326-teacher-pay?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190326-b&source=ema190326-b&t=1004&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thanks for all you do. Together, we can invest in the future of this
country.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

Kamala Harris is committed to closing the teacher pay gap by the end of
her first term as president. [ https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/9173?t=1005&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]Read her full plan to raise teacher pay
and share it with your family and friends.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/9173?t=1006&akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig ]READ THE PLAN

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3715%2E5755789%2EeT1yig

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A Catastrophic Media Failure
body:
"Robert Mueller’s investigation is over, but questions still abound." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6cc9a4c6f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **A Catastrophic Media Failure**

“Robert Mueller’s investigation is over, but questions still abound. Not about collusion, Russian interference or obstruction of justice, but about the leading lights of journalism who managed to get the story so wrong, and for so long,” Sean Davis writes in _The Wall Street Journal_. “It wasn’t merely an error here or there. America’s blue-chip journalists botched the entire story, from its birth during the presidential campaign to its final breath Sunday—and they never stopped congratulating themselves for it.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8198ff6b1d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The saga that is the Mueller Report is a consequence of what happens when you begin with a conclusion and then desperately seek evidence you hope will confirm it,” Cal Thomas writes in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9bda50397&e=3ee4985eea)_. “No amount of evidence to the contrary will keep [Democrats] from continuing investigations. House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerrold Nadler, New York Democrat, says he intends to ask Attorney General Barr to testify before his committee. We can expect plenty of grandstanding by Democratic committee members if that happens.”
---
|
---
| The President “tweeted last week that the U.S. will formally recognize the Golan Heights as part of Israel. The decision is strategically wise and morally important,” Sen. Lindsay Graham (R-SC) writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21c27ea214&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Mr. Trump has been one of the most effective American leaders in strengthening the country’s relationship with Israel. His decision to recognize the Golan Heights as part of Israel should prove yet another major, lasting achievement for his administration.”
---
|
---
| From Inauguration Day 2017 through delivery of the Special Counsel’s report last week, “the ABC, CBS and NBC evening newscasts produced a combined 2,284 minutes of ‘collusion’ coverage . . . a level of coverage normally associated only with a major war or a presidential election,” Rich Noyes writes for [NewsBusters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7072b81e51&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Yesterday, Vice President Mike Pence “reaffirmed the Trump administration's support for the U.S.-Israel relationship” during his speech at the AIPAC annual conference, Lisa Hagen reports for _[U.S. News& World Report](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bbf70806a&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Anti-Semitism has no place in the Congress of the United States of America,” the Vice President said, addressing recent comments by Rep. Ilhan Omar (D-MN). “Anyone who slanders this historic alliance between the United States and Israel should never have a seat on the Foreign Affairs Committee.”
---
|
---
| “House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, R-Calif., said Monday that Rep. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., should step down as chairman of the House Intelligence Committee,” Zachary Halaschak writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa9e0b8728&e=3ee4985eea)_. “McCarthy said Schiff used his high-profile role as leader of the committee to push a false narrative about President Trump and insinuate to the American public that Trump colluded with Russia.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cbb7f1cc85&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7549b7a57&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=678e8fde7d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

subject: Please don’t have regrets

body:
There are less than 100 hours before the first livestream watch parties for Beto kick off around the country on March 30. This is a critical moment that will launch the most ambitious effort of this campaign: a massive, grassroots movement to reach every voter. To succeed, we need as many people as possible gathering for watch parties on March 30.

#
There are less than 100 hours before the first livestream watch parties for Beto kick off around the country on March 30. This is a critical moment that will launch the most ambitious effort of this campaign: **_a massive, grassroots movement to reach every voter._**
**To succeed, we need as many people as possible gathering for watch parties on March 30.** These watch parties are the first concrete step to get to work in your community to elect Beto. At the end, there will be opportunities for everyone to plug in and volunteer.
**[Please sign up to host a watch party now to get people involved in your community. It’s easy, and we’ve got handy guides and a skilled team to help.](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party/?source=ema20190326&t=1&akid=25596%2E444211%2E8FmKVY)**
**[Host a party »](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/signup-watch-party/?source=ema20190326&t=2&akid=25596%2E444211%2E8FmKVY)**
Our campaign will be all about people-talking-to-people about our shared vision for our future. But our success depends on whether enough people get involved _now_ in every corner of this country.
**We can pull it off. But whatever happens, please don’t have any regrets about whether you were part of this, from the beginning.** March 30 is the start of our first real effort to elect Beto. And maybe, if enough of us get to work, the dawn of a new day for this country.
Now let’s get after it!
Team Beto

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Join Stacey Abrams in Dalton this Sunday! (3/31)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Our work is far from done, but we just want to say thank you. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa68d/34a064cc/7b9cfeb/7039357/3050111476/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/")

| | | Hey there - This Sunday, March 31st, Stacey Abrams will be in Dalton -- and it wouldn't be the same without you. Join us! **Last year, with your help, we changed who shows up to vote in Georgia.** We showed the nation that there is power in our voices. What made our work possible was your early and critical engagement, inspired by a belief that we could assemble a dedicated and diverse team that would go on to build a movement for _all of us_. For every Georgian who has ever felt ignored by those in power. We want to say thank you. Running a statewide voter outreach program like ours wasn't easy. But each time we asked, you answered. For that, we are so grateful. Join us this Sunday to reflect on the campaign, celebrate our victories, and learn more about how you can get involved in our work at Fair Fight. **What:** "Thank You" Reception with Stacey Abrams
**Where:** Dalton Convention Center
2211 Dug Gap Battle Rd, Dalton, GA 30720
**When:** Sunday, March 31, 4:00 PM **There is no cost to attend, but guests are asked to RSVP.** **[RSVP](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa68d/34a064cc/7b9cfeb/7039354/3050111476/VEsE/ "https://goo.gl/forms/bYzqrv4DeQHtrJX53")** Our fight has always been about making sure our democracy works for and represents everyone who has ever put their faith in it. And we know that ensuring that every American has equal access to the ballot box is the cornerstone of our democracy. In 2019, our fight continues, and this event is just one of many opportunities to get involved. Our work is far from done, but we just want to say thank you. Onward,
Lauren

body:
Dear Peter,

With just 5 days left, we still need to raise at least $8,000 before March 31 to reach our quarterly fundraising goal.

A few months back, we told you were heading to all 95 counties to lay the groundwork for 2020. So far in 2019, we've already traveled to 45 counties to hear the sentiments of rank-and-file Democrats and recruit strong candidates to run for office, launched LEAD 2020 - the largest county party membership initiative in TNDP history, and innovated our digital outreach program with the goal of inspiring and connecting with the next generation of young Democratic leaders in every pocket of Tennessee.

We’re excited for this work, and we need the resources to make it happen: Chip in $50, $100, or more right now to help us reach our goal and elect more Democrats! act.myngp.com/Forms/6954468427655547904?am=&

Looking Forward,

Maria

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: It's time, Peter
body:
I'm asking you to take a brave step.
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING:** The Trump administration is actively working to take away our health care. Again. **They're pushing to strike down the Affordable Care Act ENTIRELY, threatening the health and lives of millions of people.** I'm running for president to guarantee universal health care, and I'm doing it without taking a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs or super PACs. I'm counting on you.

**[Give right now to fund our fight to protect our rights and fuel this community-led movement for change: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d632f/3932546119/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MTEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd-box&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
Peter, when we've reached for bravery as a country, we've achieved progress, and we need to summon it again now. We won't defeat Trump by shying from the challenge in front of us, but by squaring our shoulders and facing it head on, and I need to know you're in.
**[Coming up on the FEC deadline--when each campaign's total money and donors are made public for all to see--we need you to give and help us hit 20,000 founding donors before midnight Thursday to show the strength of our movement.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d632e/3932546119/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MTEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d632e/3932546119/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MTEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Our campaign is going to fight to stop the latest Republican attacks against our health care, and we'll take the bold next step to pass Medicare for All so that no American ever has to worry about losing coverage again. We're going to fight to end gun violence, save our planet with a Green New Deal and get money out of politics. We're going to do all of this without taking a dime from corporate lobbyists or special interests--**but it's going to take bravery, and we need to back that up with the day-to-day work of getting our message out and winning support.**
We're just five days from the FEC filing deadline--the biggest test of our young campaign. On the other side of it, we'll either look like we have what it takes or we'll face a big setback. That's why it's so important you join us now. We need 20,000 people to make a gift to meet our first goal, and I'm asking you to be one of them by stepping up now.
**[Will you donate $5 or more right now to become a founding donor of this campaign and get us one step closer to the 65,000 individual contributors we need to share our vision on the debate stage?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d632e/3932546119/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MTEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Just last weekend, we officially kicked off our campaign where the president couldn't miss us: outside his Trump International Hotel in New York City. And we sent the message that where he's chosen cowardice, we choose bravery.
We're running to restore compassion and courage to leadership. We're running to stop the division and get back to building bridges. We're going to unite the country around a forward-looking vision for making people's lives better.
If that's a vision you share, I need you to fight for it. There's no more important act you can take than to donate and own a piece of what we're building. When you do it now, before the FEC deadline, you'll become a founding donor and always hold a special place in this movement. We just need you to make your gift now.
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Donate another amount](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d632e/3932546119/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5MTEtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2911-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
Thank you for everything,

Kirsten

[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976c01/2ae112ef/13d20bc9/357d6317/3932546119/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020

name: News Alert
subject: BREAKING: courts could strike down the ACA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
**BREAKING "Justice Department now says courts should strike the entire ACA"**
\- _AXIOS_ , March 25, 2019

If the courts strike down the Affordable Care Act, millions of Americans will lose their healthcare coverage.

**[Senator Bob Menendez knows access to affordable health care should be non-negotiable, and he's fighting to stop the dismantling of the ACA. If you agree that the ACA must be protected, add your name today >>](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c98/74d715b9/19ba0ab2/1f4bc704/820254864/VEsH/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?gpsid=39_73_5955&source=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Senator+Bob+Menendez+knows+access+to+aff")** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c98/74d715b9/19ba0ab2/1f4bc705/820254864/VEsE/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?gpsid=39_73_5955&source=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME")
---
Friend,

Donald Trump's administration is going after the Affordable Care Act once again, and this time they're not stopping at pre-existing conditions -- they are trying to dismantle the entire healthcare system. They're going after savings for seniors, protection from lifetime limits, mental health, maternity care, and more.

If the courts decide to strike down the entire ACA, millions of Americans and thousands of New Jerseyans will lose their healthcare coverage. Countless Americans will be left with _zero coverage_ when going to the doctor, refilling their prescriptions, and seeking help in an emergency.

Look, this is about people's lives. Already, Americans are struggling to access and pay for the health care they desperately need, and tearing down the ACA will just add salt to the wound.

Bob Menendez was one of the lead authors of the ACA in the Senate, and he knows how important it is for New Jersey families. Time and again, Bob has stood up against the Republicans' misguided attempts to strip health care from the American people, and right now he's ready to keep fighting.

**[Add your name to stand with Senator Bob Menendez in the fight to protect the Affordable Care Act from President Donald Trump's attacks.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c98/74d715b9/19ba0ab2/1f4bc706/820254864/VEsF/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/protect-the-affordable-care-act?gpsid=39_73_5955&source=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190326_ACA_engg_gq_ful_arn_NA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+to+stand+with+Senator+Bob+")**

Thank you,

Team Menendez
